title: Comparison Example Detail Response Schema
description: Success-envelope response schema for GET /api/v1/optimization-comparisons/{comparison_id}/examples/{example_id}. Route is wrapped (optimization_comparison_routes). The data field contains the payload from OptimizationComparisonService.get_example_detail.

success.description: Discriminator — always true for success responses

schema_version.description: Version of the comparison payload schema

example_id.description: ID of the example being detailed

status.description: Comparison status for this example (e.g. improvement, regression, neutral)

stability.description: Stability classification for this example row

measures_by_run.description: Per-run aggregated measures keyed by run_id

trial_counts_by_run.description: Number of trials per run for this example, keyed by run_id

available_metric_keys.description: Sorted union of metric keys across all runs and trials for this example

run_summaries.description: Per-run summary including trial count and aggregated measures

trial_count.description: Number of trials for this example in this run

measures.description: Aggregated measures for this example in this run

trials.description: All individual trials across all runs for this example, sorted by run_label/model_label/trial_id
